channel.title: Data Cleaning on Ahmed Azeez
channel.description: Recent content in Data Cleaning on Ahmed Azeez

item.title: Dog Ownership in Seattle
item.description: Introduction Cleaning Data Data Visualizations Conclusions Introduction This report investigates licensed dog ownership in Seattle, WA (USA). I’m curious about a few things here: People estimate that there are 160,000 dogs in Seattle. Where are they? Seattle is a relatively densely-populated area. Are small, apartment-friendly dogs preferred? Using this information, what recommendations could be made to aspiring dog sitters and walkers in Seattle? I will annotate each step of data analysis as I go.
